CustomField.description: Determines how the Accounting Period is stamped for Maintenance Reserve invoices when using the Accrual method. Select "Utilization Period" to derive the accounting period based on the aircraft usage period. Select "Invoice Date" to derive it based on the invoice creation date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Determines how the Accounting Period is stamped for Maintenance Reserve invoices when using the Accrual method. Select "Utilization Period" to derive the accounting period based on the aircraft usage period. Select "Invoice Date" to derive it based on the invoice creation date.
CustomField.label: MR Accounting Period Based On
